title: Justified (Justify)
text: Justified (Justify) Justifies the tabs so that they occupy the full width of the tab widget. Default is False . " justify = True | False " Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: Overrides the Tabs Alignment , Tab Offset , Fixed Tab Width , and Tab Width properties. Using in ProcScript You can use $properties or $fieldproperties to set or get the property and its value. For more information, see the "$properties" and "$fieldproperties" topics . $fieldproperties(FLD) = "justify=true" Copy Applies To utabex (TabEx) Related Links Tabs Alignment (TabsAlignment) The Tabs Alignment widget property determines how tabs are aligned in a horizontal strip. Default is Left. Tab Offset (TabOffset) Number of character cells (or pixels) that the edge of the tab strip is separated from edges of the widget. Default is 0 (no offset). Tab Width (TabWidth) Width of all tabs in the widget, in character cells. By default, the tab size is based on the length of the longest label,or the size of the default image. Value is a number; minimum is 5 characters. Fixed Tab Width (FixedWidth) Determines whether the biggest label in tab set defines the tab size used for all tabs, or the tab size varies with its label. $properties Return or set the current widget properties of a field. $fieldproperties Return or set the current widget properties of an instance of a field.
